source_text: Lobbying disclosure
group_label: State has a lobbying-disclosure system (CPI top-level category)

source_text: The following types of lobbyists are included in the register: professional lobbyists/consultants, in-house company lobbyists, in-house organisation lobbyists, professional consultancies, law firms, think tanks, research institutions, public entities, government agencies/employees
group_label: Scope of lobbyist types covered by the registry (consultants, in-house, firms, etc.)

source_text: There is no (or low) financial or time threshold to qualify/exempt lobbyists from registration
group_label: Lobbying registry has no or low financial/time exemption threshold

source_text: The following are included as targets of lobbying: legislative branches, executive branch officials, Ministers, Deputy Ministers, members of parliament, Director-Generals and senior officials, staff, administrative branch/bureaucracy
group_label: Scope of lobbying targets covered (legislators, executive officials, staff, etc.)

source_text: A wide breadth of activities are included, eg, oral, written, electronic, virtual communications; organising meetings for others; events; phone calls and emails
group_label: Scope of lobbying activities covered (oral, written, electronic, events, etc.)

source_text: Changes (eg, registering/deregistering lobbyists, new clients) are updated close to real time (eg, daily)
group_label: Frequency with which lobby lists are updated for the public

source_text: Lobbying activities are disclosed close to real time (eg, daily)
group_label: Lobbying activity reports are disclosed close to real time

source_text: Ministerial diaries are disclosed monthly (or more frequently)
group_label: Ministerial / official diaries disclosed monthly or more frequently

source_text: Lobbyist register is online
group_label: Lobbyist register is online

source_text: Diaries available online (eg, lobbyists, ministers, ministerial staff)
group_label: Lobbyist / minister / staff diaries are available online

source_text: Available without registration, free to access, open license (eg, no limits to reuse), non-proprietary format (eg, CSV, not Excel), machine readable
group_label: Lobbying data is open-license, free, machine-readable, non-proprietary

source_text: Downloadable (eg, as files, database)
group_label: Lobbying data is downloadable as files / database

source_text: Searchable, simultaneous sorting with multiple criteria
group_label: Lobbying data is searchable with simultaneous multi-criteria sorting

source_text: Unique identifiers (eg, for lobbyists, individuals, organisations)
group_label: Unique identifiers exist for lobbyists / individuals / organisations

source_text: Linked or interconnected data (to other datasets, eg, campaign financing)
group_label: Lobbying data linked or interconnected to other datasets (e.g., campaign finance)

source_text: Historical data in lobbyist register is archived and published; downloadable
group_label: Historical lobbyist register data is archived, published, downloadable

source_text: Changes or updates documented with a flagging system
group_label: Changes/updates to lobbying records are flagged with a documentation system

source_text: Full names of lobbyists/organisations, (not abbreviations or ambiguous names)
group_label: Full names (not abbreviations) of lobbyists / organisations are disclosed

source_text: Contact details provided (eg, Address, telephone and/or website)
group_label: Contact details (address, telephone, website) of lobbyists/orgs are disclosed

source_text: Legal form (eg, public, private, not-for-profit, NGO, government)
group_label: Legal form of organisation (public, private, not-for-profit, NGO, government) is disclosed

source_text: Company registration number
group_label: Company registration number is disclosed

source_text: Sector (eg, transport, energy), sub sector
group_label: Sector / sub-sector of organisation is disclosed

source_text: Type of lobbyist contract (eg, salaried staff, contracted)
group_label: Type of lobbyist contract (salaried staff vs contracted) is disclosed

source_text: List of all prior public offices that lobbyists have held, dates when left office
group_label: List of prior public offices held by lobbyists, with dates left office

source_text: Database of public officials who are subject to a ban on lobbying (eg, cooling off period)
group_label: Revolving-door cooling-off period before legislators can become lobbyists

source_text: Client list (for all consultant lobbyists and firms)
group_label: Lobbyist must list names of all principals represented

source_text: Names of all sponsors or members (for associations and representative groups)
group_label: Names of all sponsors or members are disclosed (for associations / representative groups)

source_text: List of board seats held (eg, in associations, companies)
group_label: Board seats held by lobbyists or orgs are disclosed

source_text: Direct business associations with public officials, candidates or members of their households
group_label: Direct business associations between lobbyists and public officials/candidates/their households are disclosed

source_text: Total lobbying income (for consultant lobbyists/lobby firms)
group_label: Total lobbying income for consultant lobbyists / lobby firms is disclosed

source_text: Lobbying income per client
group_label: Lobbying income broken down per client is disclosed

source_text: Income sources (eg, including government agencies, grant-making foundations, companies) and amount received
group_label: Income sources and amounts received are disclosed

source_text: Number of lobbyists employed/contracted (total and full-time equivalent)
group_label: Number of lobbyists employed/contracted (total and FTE) is disclosed

source_text: Amount of time spent on lobbying
group_label: Amount of time spent on lobbying is disclosed

source_text: Total lobbying expenditure (both in-house and consulting)
group_label: Total lobbying expenditure across in-house and consulting is disclosed

source_text: Compensated/uncompensated lobbying activities
group_label: Compensated vs uncompensated lobbying activities are distinguished in disclosure

source_text: Expenditure per issue
group_label: Lobbying expenditure broken down per issue is disclosed

source_text: Expenditure on membership/sponsorship of organisations that lobby (eg, trade associations)
group_label: Expenditure on membership/sponsorship of lobbying organisations (e.g., trade associations) is disclosed

source_text: Expenditures benefitting public officials or employees including financial/non-financial gifts and support, employer/principal on whose behalf expenses were made
group_label: Expenditures benefiting public officials/employees (incl. gifts) are disclosed

source_text: Campaign/political contributions, including in-kind
group_label: Campaign / political contributions including in-kind are disclosed

source_text: Organisation/interest(s) represented (beneficiary)
group_label: Organisation / interest represented (beneficiary) is recorded for each contact

source_text: Names of persons contacted and their position/role
group_label: Names and roles of public officials contacted are recorded for each meeting

source_text: Institution/department contacted
group_label: Institution / department contacted is recorded for each meeting

source_text: If a meeting, names of all attendees
group_label: Names of all attendees are recorded for each meeting

source_text: Date
group_label: Date is recorded for each lobbying contact

source_text: Form (eg, in person meeting, video conference, phone call)
group_label: Form of contact (in-person, video, phone) is recorded for each contact

source_text: Location
group_label: Location is recorded for each lobbying contact

source_text: Any materials that were shared, excluding commercially sensitive materials (before, during and after the meeting)
group_label: Materials shared (excluding commercially sensitive) are recorded for each meeting

source_text: Topics/issues discussed
group_label: Subject of lobbying / general issues are disclosed

source_text: Outcomes sought (eg, legislation/policies supported/opposed)
group_label: Position taken (legislation supported or opposed) is disclosed

source_text: Targeted areas of public policy or legislation, including a list of official legislative references/bill numbers/measures etc
group_label: Specific bill number / legislation ID is disclosed for each lobbying issue

source_text: In addition to legislative lobbyists, does the deﬁnition recognize executive branch lobbyists?
group_label: Executive- / administrative-agency lobbying triggers lobbyist status

source_text: How much does an individual have to make/spend to qualify as a lobbyist or to prompt registration as a lobbyist, according to the deﬁnition?
group_label: Dollar threshold amount required to register as a lobbyist

source_text: Is a lobbyist required to ﬁle a registration form?
group_label: Lobbyists are required to register

source_text: How many days can lobbying take place before registration is required?
group_label: Maximum lobbying activity allowed before registration is required

source_text: Is subject matter or bill number to be addressed by a lobbyist required on registration forms?
group_label: Subject matter or bill number required on the lobbyist registration form

source_text: How often is registration by a lobbyist required?
group_label: Lobbyist registration renewal frequency

source_text: Within how many days must a lobbyist notify the oversight agency of changes in registration?
group_label: Time window to notify oversight agency of changes to registration information

source_text: Is a lobbyist required to submit a photograph with registration?
group_label: Photograph required with lobbyist registration

source_text: Is a lobbyist required to identify by name each employer on the registration form?
group_label: Lobbyist must identify each employer/principal on the registration form

source_text: Is a lobbyist required to include on the registration form any additional information about the type of lobbying work he or she does (i.e., compensated or non-compensated/contract or salaried)?
group_label: Lobbyist must report type of lobbying work (compensated vs non-compensated, contract vs salaried) on registration

source_text: Is a lobbyist required to ﬁle a spending report?
group_label: Lobbyists are required to file periodic spending/expenditure reports

source_text: How often during each two-year cycle is a lobbyist required to report spending?
group_label: Frequency of lobbyist spending reports

source_text: Is compensation/salary required to be reported by a lobbyist on spending reports?
group_label: Lobbyist reports compensation / salary received

source_text: Are summaries (totals) of spending classiﬁed by category types (i.e., gifts, entertainment, postage, etc.)?
group_label: Lobbyist spending reported in summary categories (gifts, entertainment, postage, etc.)

source_text: What spending must be itemized?
group_label: Itemization required for lobbyist spending above a per-item threshold

source_text: Is the lobbyist employer/principal on whose behalf the itemized expenditure was made required to be identiﬁed?
group_label: Itemized expenditures identify the lobbyist employer/principal on whose behalf they were made

source_text: Is the recipient of the itemized expenditure required to be identiﬁed?
group_label: Itemized expenditures identify the recipient

source_text: Is the date of the itemized expenditure required to be reported?
group_label: Itemized expenditures identify the date

source_text: Is a description of the itemized expenditure required to be reported?
group_label: Itemized expenditures include a description

source_text: Is subject matter or bill number to be addressed by a lobbyist required on spending reports?
group_label: Subject matter or bill number required on lobbyist spending reports

source_text: Is spending on household members of public ofﬁcials by a lobbyist required to be reported?
group_label: Spending on household members of public officials is reported

source_text: Is a lobbyist required to disclose direct business associations with public ofﬁcials, candidates or members of their households?
group_label: Direct business associations between lobbyists and public officials/candidates/their households are disclosed

source_text: What is the statutory provision for a lobbyist giving and reporting gifts?
group_label: Statutory provision governing lobbyist gift giving and gift reporting

source_text: Is a lobbyist who has done no spending during a ﬁling period required to make a report of no activity?
group_label: Lobbyist with no activity in a filing period must still file a no-activity report

source_text: Is an employer or principal of a lobbyist required to ﬁle a spending report?
group_label: Principals / employers of lobbyists are required to file spending reports

source_text: Is compensation/salary required to be reported on employer/principal spending reports?
group_label: Compensation/salary is reported on principal/employer spending reports

source_text: Does the oversight agency provide lobbyists/employers with online registration?
group_label: Online registration is provided by the oversight agency

source_text: Does the oversight agency provide lobbyists/employers with online spending reporting?
group_label: Online spending reporting is provided by the oversight agency

source_text: Does the oversight agency provide training about how to ﬁle registrations/spending reports electronically?
group_label: Oversight agency provides training on electronic filing

source_text: Location/format of registrations or active lobbyist directory
group_label: Location and format where registrations / lobbyist directory is publicly available

source_text: Location/format of spending reports
group_label: Location and format where spending reports are publicly available

source_text: Cost of copies
group_label: Cost of obtaining copies of lobbying records

source_text: Are sample registration forms/spending reports available the Web?
group_label: Sample registration / spending forms are available on the web

source_text: Does the state agency provide an overall lobbying spending total by year?
group_label: Oversight agency publishes overall lobbying spending total by year

source_text: Does the state agency provide an overall lobbying spending total by spending-report deadlines?
group_label: Oversight agency publishes overall lobbying spending total by report-deadline period

source_text: Does the state agency provide an overall lobbying spending total by industries lobbyists represent?
group_label: Oversight agency publishes overall lobbying spending total by industry

source_text: How often are lobby lists updated?
group_label: Frequency with which lobby lists are updated for the public

source_text: Does the state have statutory auditing authority?
group_label: Oversight agency has statutory auditing authority

source_text: Does the state agency conduct mandatory reviews or audits?
group_label: Oversight agency conducts mandatory reviews/audits of lobbying reports

source_text: Is there a statutory penalty for late ﬁling of lobby registration form?
group_label: Statutory penalty for late filing of lobbyist registration form

source_text: Is there a statutory penalty for late ﬁling of a lobby spending report?
group_label: Statutory penalty for late filing of lobbyist spending report

source_text: When was a penalty for late ﬁling of a lobby spending report last levied?
group_label: Most recent levy of penalty for late filing of lobbyist spending report

source_text: Is there a statutory penalty for incomplete ﬁling of a lobby registration form?
group_label: Statutory penalty for incomplete filing of lobbyist registration form

source_text: Is there a statutory penalty for incomplete ﬁling of a lobby spending report?
group_label: Statutory penalty for incomplete filing of lobbyist spending report

source_text: When was a penalty for incomplete ﬁling of a lobby spending report last levied?
group_label: Most recent levy of penalty for incomplete filing of lobbyist spending report

source_text: Does the state publish a list of delinquent ﬁlers either on the Web or in a printed document?
group_label: State publishes a list of delinquent filers

source_text: Is there a "cooling off" period required before legislators can register as lobbyists?
group_label: Revolving-door cooling-off period before legislators can become lobbyists
